name: Rich n' Buttery Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, cut the butter into the cake mix until crumbly. Add the beaten egg and mix well.
2. Press the mixture into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese and confectioner's sugar together. Add the eggs and vanilla; beat until smooth. Spread evenly over the crust.
4. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Reduce heat to 325°F and bake an additional 10 minutes.
5. Dust with confectioner's sugar while warm. Cool to room temperature before cutting.
